div.p: Internal structure of the scalar autograd node for automatic differentiation

ol.li: Gradient Persistence: grad is never reset by internal logic, only by external optimizer calls.
Graph Integrity: _prev must contain references to ensure GC doesn't prune graph during backward pass.
Chain Rule: _backward must use accumulation (+=) to solve the "multigraph" problem where one node feeds multiple others.
Topo Sort: The graph must remain a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) for correct backpropagation.

div.p: Forward Value The actual scalar value being computed.

ul.li: Must use += to support multigraph paths

div.p: Dependency Graph Set of parent Value objects producing this.
Local Gradient Closure Lambda computing the chain rule step.
Operation Tag Debug label for graph visualization.
